scripts.test:integration: dotenv -e .env.test -- sh -c 'docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml up -d --wait db_test && npx prisma migrate reset --force --skip-generate --skip-seed && jest --runInBand --setupFilesAfterEnv ./tests/setup.integration.js --testPathPattern=tests/integration'
scripts.test:integration:ci: dotenv -e .env.test -- sh -c 'docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml down -v >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml up -d --wait db_test && npx prisma migrate reset --force --skip-generate --skip-seed && jest --runInBand --setupFilesAfterEnv ./tests/setup.integration.js --testPathPattern=tests/integration; EXIT_CODE=$?; docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml down -v; exit $EXIT_CODE'
